name: anagnosdoor.com
message: Anagnos Door Co. specializes in the sale, installation, maintenance, and servicing of commercial overhead doors and related products. Established in 1989, the company is well qualified to serve clients in the competitive construction market of the Chicago area. With a team of IDEA-certified fire door technicians, Anagnos Door Co. ensures high-quality service and expertise. Their primary clients include businesses in need of commercial and industrial door solutions. Employees: 50 Revenue: $8.6 Million Industry: Home Improvement & Hardware Retail Phone Number: (708) 728-9000
